title: clusia flava
intro: Clusia flava, also known as the Yellow Clusia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Clusiaceae, native to tropical Central and South America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant has been traditionally used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as to soothe digestive problems and reduce fever. In herbal preparations, Clusia flava is often used as a tincture or tea, and has been found to have potential health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving immune function.
